fields.summary: Controls public share actions, short-link generation, and share preview embeds in page chrome.
fields.admin_requirements: Staff and admin pages should only render the quick-share trigger and modal when this suite feature is enabled.
fields.public_requirements: Public pages should not expose share buttons, short links, QR codes, or preview embeds unless this suite feature is enabled.
fields.service_requirements: Requires links short-url storage and share-preview middleware behavior only when enabled.
